nodes.label: AI for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: AI as distorting meaning and lacking personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to organize meeting notes, reword emails, and review documents for suggested edits

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI inconsistency and hallucination in specialized domains
nodes.grounding_span: giving me incorrect information on well known and established banking regulations

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting due to required review and errors
nodes.grounding_span: Its current version does not really set up that much time

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: AI as complement preserving human expertise
nodes.grounding_span: it could become a substitute for a lot of what I do

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I do collaborate with it through out a task

nodes.label: Professional reputation and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: why am I using AI at all if it cannot be trusted

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and brand
nodes.grounding_span: my personal brand/reputation being embedded in the language

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: where/when my skills will be lapped by AI and be replaced

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's assumption of expertise
nodes.grounding_span: giving me incorrect information on well known and established banking regulations

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's lack of personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: it makes me sound like a robot instead of my personal brand

nodes.label: Conditional acceptance of AI for formal communication
nodes.grounding_span: When i am communicating with upper management...it may be best to 'know the audience'

nodes.label: Resistance to expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I do expect my relationship with AI to grow at work

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: I always review it because it is prone to errors

nodes.label: Audience-aware communication tailoring — adapts style based on recipient
nodes.grounding_span: know the audience and be more direct with my language
